violations.text: Food was delivered under 135 degrees. Food was temped upon delivery. Mother kitchen was contacted and food was determined to be temped at 150 less one hour prior. Food was being used immediately. Food to be turned down if delivered less than 135. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The walls in the warewashing area is constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The walls in the ware-washing area is constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Approved finish guidance provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The walls in the dish machine area is constructed of porous wood. This material is not durable/easily cleanable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The walls in the dish machine area is constructed of porous wood. This material is not durable/easily cleanable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024
The walls in the warewashing area has an accumulation of bio-film. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Per PIC, paperwork has been submitted to management recently. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was (0 ) parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for (quat) sanitizer is (200-400) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023
